query:
SELECT tc.id, tc.stepId, tc.taskDate, tc.completedAt, ps.title as stepTitle
FROM task_completions tc
JOIN patients p ON tc.patientId = p.id
JOIN users u ON p.userId = u.id
LEFT JOIN protocol_steps ps ON tc.stepId = ps.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Jacob%'
ORDER BY tc.taskDate DESC, tc.completedAt DESC;
